overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City street at night. The scene features heavy rainfall, neon-lit billboards, reflective wet pavement, and distinctive cyberpunk architecture including a large cylindrical advertising structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with large overhead billboard

events.description: large box truck approaches the intersection from the right with headlights on
truck passes close by the camera on the right side, splashing water

agents.ego_description: beginning to walk along the wet sidewalk near the intersection, moving away from the starting position

notable_agents.action: large box truck driving through the intersection, passing close to the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying a face with 'OUTTA YOUR MIND' text
red and white striped concrete construction barriers lining the sidewalk
tall street lamp illuminating the rainy scene with warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy urban intersection at night. A large illuminated billboard dominates the view ahead while a large truck passes by on the right. The character begins walking along the wet sidewalk next to red and white construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk lined with construction barriers and advertisements

events.description: character maintains steady walking pace along the curved sidewalk, passing multiple billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the red and white barriers, glancing at advertisements on the left

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet road with headlights reflecting on the pavement

entered.detail: illuminated billboard displaying 'DELAMAIN' text with corporate logo
pink and purple neon advertisement with bright illumination

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the barrier-lined sidewalk, passing various illuminated billboards including one for Delamain. The large initial billboard falls behind as the street curves, and street lights pass by on the left. Cars occasionally drive past on the wet road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching large cylindrical advertising structure

events.description: large circular advertising structure becomes prominently visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the road as the environment opens up, approaching a distinctive cylindrical building

notable_agents.action: car driving along the wet road with headlights cutting through the rain

entered.detail: large cylindrical building covered in rotating digital advertisements and neon lights
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a face with '07' text

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the street opens up revealing a massive cylindrical advertising structure ahead. The Delamain billboard and pink neon sign pass out of view behind, while a new vertical billboard appears on the right. The red and white barriers curve away to the left as the road widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: street alongside large cylindrical advertising tower

events.description: character walks alongside and begins to pass the large circular advertising structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the large circular advertising structure, following the sidewalk as it curves

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the circular structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the massive cylindrical advertising tower, passing its glowing digital displays. A pedestrian figure walks ahead in the distance. The circular structure eventually falls behind to the left as the character continues down the rain-soaked street toward the distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from a crowded intersection into a wide vista dominated by massive digital architecture. It begins at a night intersection where a large illuminated billboard looms ahead and a truck passes by as the character walks along red and white construction barriers. As the street curves, the initial billboard recedes and the camera passes a series of glowing signs, including one for Delamain, while cars glide across the reflective wet pavement. The scene then opens up to reveal a towering cylindrical advertising structure, with the previous neon signs falling behind as the barriers curve away and the road widens. Finally, the camera tracks alongside the glowing digital displays of the massive tower before the structure slips to the left, leaving the character to continue down the shimmering street toward distant city lights.
